theme_and_archetype.description: An authoritative, clean, and functional aesthetic that balances the trusted CUNY institutional brand with the premium polish of a modern AI tool (like Claude or Perplexity).

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-serif text-cuny_navy
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-sans font-semibold tracking-tight text-primary

layout_strategy.header: Sticky at the top, z-50. Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80). Contains the SVG Spinning Compass Logo on the left and the Campus Switcher searchable dropdown on the right.
layout_strategy.marquee: Full-width section just below the header or above the hero. Displays CUNY college identities.
layout_strategy.landing_hub: Centered layout with generous padding (p-12 to p-24). Features a massive, high-contrast search bar in the center. Below the search bar, a 2x2 or 4-col bento grid of Suggestion Tiles.
layout_strategy.ai_chat_interface: App-style layout. Left Sidebar (width 260px, collapsible) holding 'Recent Queries' and 'Saved Resources'. Right Main Area holding scrollable chat history and a fixed bottom input bar (the transformed search bar).

compass_spin.trigger: Page load / continuous or on action
compass_spin.keyframes: @keyframes calibrateSpin { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 50% { transform: rotate(1080deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(1440deg); } } (Adjust to snap to North/0deg)

progressive_disclosure.trigger: Focusing or clicking the massive hero search bar.
progressive_disclosure.effect: Use Framer Motion's layoutId. The hero search bar smoothly morphs into the bottom-fixed chat input. The landing page content fades out, the left sidebar slides in (from width 0 to 260px), and the chat container fades in.

marquee_hover.effect: Items default to grayscale and opacity-70. On hover, transition to grayscale-0, opacity-100, scale-105, and reveal CUNY colors.

components_and_features.campus_switcher: Shadcn Popover + Command component. Allows users to search and select CUNY schools (John Jay, Baruch, Hunter, etc.).
components_and_features.hero_search_bar: Massive padding, thick border or subtle shadow, placeholder 'Ask Compass AI about John Jay...'. Needs a clear submit icon button inside.
components_and_features.chat_message: Claude-style UI. AI replies have white background and subtle borders. User messages have soft gray background. AI replies must include a 'Save Resource' action button.
components_and_features.collapsible_sidebar: Includes a toggle button. Sections for 'Recent Queries' and 'Saved Resources' with minimalist lists.

tile_finance.description: Minimalist illustration for Financial Aid Deadlines tile

tile_academic.description: Minimalist illustration for Academic Advising tile

instructions_to_main_agent: Install necessary dependencies: framer-motion, react-fast-marquee, lucide-react, and required Shadcn components (Command, Popover, Input, Button, ScrollArea).

Implement the SVG Spinning Compass logo manually. Draw a minimalist compass using SVG and apply the 'calibrateSpin' keyframe animation (6s cubic-bezier snapping to north) to the needle `<path>` or `<g>` element.

For the College Marquee: Since exact CUNY logo URLs are not provided, construct the marquee items using a combination of a Lucide icon (e.g., Landmark, Library) and the college name styled in Playfair Display. Apply a group hover effect that removes grayscale and applies CUNY Navy/Gold colors.

Implement the Progressive Disclosure seamlessly: The main state of the app should toggle between 'Landing' and 'Chat'. Use framer-motion's <AnimatePresence> and <motion.div layoutId='search-bar'> so the massive central search bar physically travels down to become the chat input.
Ensure 'Save Resource' buttons on AI chat replies are functional or clearly mocked, using a Bookmark icon.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='campus-switcher', data-testid='hero-search-input', data-testid='suggestion-tile-1').
Load Google Fonts: 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' in your HTML/CSS.
